title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Quikr International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Quikr International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quikr International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
